title: Through Faith In The Name Of Jesus
summary: [Act 3:4-6 And Peter, fastening his eyes upon him with John, said, Look on us. And he gave heed unto them, expecting to receive something of them. Then Peter said, Silver and gold have I none; but such as I have give I thee: In the name of Jesus Christ of Nazareth rise up and walk.] Peter fastened his eyes on the man. Normally, this beggar was used to focusing on the hands of potential givers. The man was lame but he could see. God wanted him to look into the eyes of a man who had seen Jesus for three years. To look into the eyes of Peter is to look into the eyes of Jesus. “Such as I have give I thee.” What does Peter have – let us together declare: “the name of Jesus.” What is it we have today? Have we begun to rely on other things other than Jesus? I pray we still have only Jesus to give to the world today.
